MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: LaVon Granger. Walter G. Parsley, Esq. represented the plaintiff and defendant appeared in pro per. The case did not settle. Trial date is confirmed.
